data.title: Robotic Process Automation Market expected to reach USD 20.79 billion by 2032, starting from USD 3.60 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Pune, India, as of January 28, 2026, the Robotic Process Automation Market is experiencing a significant shift towards growth and evolution. This is driven by global enterprises ramping up AI integration, updating regulations, and revamping operational structures. The market was valued at USD 3.60 billion in 2025.

data.title: Inventor from Edmonton invents NO LOSE LOCK, a highly-visible trailer padlock for enhanced security.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor from Edmonton, AB, Canada discussed the creation of the NO LOSE LOCK. This innovation was developed to enhance visibility of a trailer padlock, even in low light conditions. The inventor aimed to provide heightened security for parked trailers.

data.title: Tabimori, Inc. introduces vegetarian omakase sushi course for global travelers, expanding menu of popular service.
data.description: In Tokyo on January 28, 2026, Tabimori, Inc. announced the addition of a new fully vegetarian omakase option to its renowned sushi interpreting service, "sushiuniversity®." This option is crafted without the inclusion of any seafood, catering to the dietary preferences of customers. The service, known for its popularity among international travelers, now offers this distinctive menu choice. For more information, visit the official website at https://sushiuniversity....

data.title: AI-driven discovery benefits few brands, with many disappearing. SOCi's 2026 Local Visibility Index shows rising costs of local invisibility in the AI age, released on Jan 28 in San Diego.
data.description: The 2026 Local Visibility Index (LVI) by SOCi Inc. has been unveiled, highlighting the increasing expense of being locally invisible during the AI era. Based in San Diego, the company is recognized for its workforce specialized in enhancing visibility for multi-location establishments in local and AI search. The report sheds light on the growing significance of maintaining a strong local presence in the digital landscape.

data.title: Invesco beats Q4 earnings with adjusted EPS of 62 cents (vs. consensus of 58 cents), driven by higher revenues and margins.
data.description: Invesco Ltd (NYSE: IVZ) exceeded expectations in their fourth-quarter earnings report, with adjusted earnings reaching 62 cents per share, surpassing the consensus of 58 cents per share. This was attributed to improved revenues and effective expense management. Analyst Alexander Blostein from Goldman Sachs maintained a Neutral rating for Invesco and set a price target of $28.75. The company also saw better-than-expected net management and performance fees. For the full details, please refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story on Invesco's performance.

data.title: Global market for Captive Petroleum Refinery Hydrogen Generation valued at US$54.2B in 2024, projected to reach US$77.8B by 2030, growing at 6.2% CAGR.
data.description: A report on Captive Petroleum Refinery Hydrogen Generation has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for this sector reached a value of US$54.2 Billion in 2024 and is estimated to hit US$77.8 Billion by 2030, exhibiting a CAGR of 6.2% between 2024 and 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, drivers, and projections to support informed decision-making.

data.title: Healthcare Triangle, Inc. (HCTI) to present at Deal Flow Discovery Conference in Atlantic City. Nasdaq: HCTI.
data.description: Pleasanton, California – On January 28, 2026, Healthcare Triangle, Inc. (Nasdaq: HCTI) – a prominent provider of digital transformation services for the healthcare and life sciences sectors – disclosed its involvement in the Deal Flow Discovery Conference. The conference is scheduled to take place soon, highlighting the company's dedication to networking and exploring potential business opportunities.
